nasb.text: The priest shall then look, and if there is a white swelling in the skin, and it has turned the hair white, and there is quick raw flesh in the swelling,

esv.text: and the priest shall look. And if there is a white swelling in the skin that has turned the hair white, and there is raw flesh in the swelling,

cnv.text: 祭司要察看，如果發現皮上有白色浮腫，毛已經變白，患處的肉紅腫，

ccb.text: 祭司检查时，如果发现他皮肤上有白色肿包，毛发变白，患处出现疮口，
